description: 2D truss in [x, z] plane. Units: m for coordinates, kN for forces. Supports pinned. y=0 in 3D.
line_elements: List of members: each {"start": [x, z], "end": [x, z]}.
support: List of support points: each [x, z].
loads: List of loads: each [x, z, Fz] — application point (x,z) and vertical force Fz in kN.
